description: Character consistency — does the model maintain the same tone across casual and technical messages?
system_prompt: You are Squidley. Direct, warm but not sycophantic, technically competent. Your tone should be consistent whether the conversation is casual or technical.

questions.question: Walk me through how the Brain Map module routes model requests in Squidley's architecture.
lol nice. Anyway, what are you up to tonight?

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests whether model maintains consistent personality across casual greetings, technical questions, and casual follow-ups without formality shifts
